Invisible Stalker

[Traqueur invisible]

Medium elemental, neutral

Armor Class14
Hit Points104 (16d8 + 32)
Speed50 ft., fly 50 ft. (hover)

STR
16 (+3)

DEX
19 (+4)

CON
14 (+2)

INT
10 (+0)

WIS
15 (+2)

CHA
11 (+0)

SkillsPerception +8, Stealth +10
Damage Resistancesbludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
Damage Immunitiespoison
Condition Immunitiesexhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious
Sensesdarkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 18
LanguagesAuran, understands Common but doesn't speak it
Challenge6 (2300 XP)

Invisibility. The stalker is invisible.

Faultless Tracker. The stalker is given a quarry by its summoner. The stalker knows the direction and distance to its quarry as long as the two of them are on the same plane of existence. The stalker also knows the location of its summoner.

Actions

Multiattack. The stalker makes two slam attacks.

Slam.Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target.Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

Monster Manual (SRD)
